title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami, Robin as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Give up already, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hunger and lack of sleep are terrible for the skin, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Come, I'll spoon you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shut it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can't afford to give up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to win this challenge for myself and the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: stubborn-ness alone won't make miracles, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're already on the ropes physically and mentally.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only that, you can't even set foot in the kitchen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: True. So I'll just have to find another way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A pirate crew's cook has to be useful in more than just the kitchen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let's do this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: MOMORIRO FISH ACQUA PAZZA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As a parent, a dish where whitefish is simmered with various ingredients. No broth or,bouillon is used, allowing for the ingredients to stand on their own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Time for some Bushcraft cooking!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the Italian-for "to cut," Tagliata are dishes made from thinly sliced cuts of beef or game, meat grilled with a few simple seasonings and served with a'side of vegetables.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: and Momoiro Duck Tagliata!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My, my! What fashionable present- tattoo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can hardly believe this is an outdoorsy meal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What chic dishes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did you get the energy to make this when you're so exhausted, dahling?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You had to search a forest teaching with creepy- crawlies for ingredients too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go on and dig in, Nami.9 is it yummy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good, good! I'm glad you love it, Robin. »

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My word! He convinced himself he was serving a meal to lovely ladies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and used that thought to summon every last bit of energy from his tired body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This boy is fright- ending...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...on more than one level!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And here's your portion. Eat every bite, 'Kay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You even made some for me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are you sure that was wise, dahling?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *ImproveruptU spoon made from a momopea pea pea pod wrapped with vines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Simply heating fish or meat leads to a meal with incomplete nutrition that digests poorly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: worst of all, there's no refinement to the flavors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just food, not a meal to revitalize body and soul.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BADUM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHAT IN THE WORLD?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BETA- Endorphins, DOPAMINE, AnANDAMIDE, QREXIN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Deliciousness is washing through my brain like a final wave...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...setting all the happy chemicals in my brain to gushing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How can it be 7H/S delicious?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You had no seasonings or utensils. Basically nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HN? What're you talking about? That stuff's all over.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
